name: data_summary_spreadsheets_2023.zip
description: Multi-year data summary spreadsheet with high-level facility info, plus yearly spreadsheets with emissions by GHG and process. This is the single most useful file for a general archive -- start here if you only grab one thing.

name: ghgp_data_parent_company.xlsb
description: Each reporting facility's highest-level U.S. parent company and percent ownership. Useful for corporate-accountability angles (which parent companies operate the highest emitters).

name: emissions_by_unit_and_fuel_type_c_d_aa.zip
description: Unit-level and fuel-level emissions for Pulp & Paper (Subpart AA), Electricity Generation (Subpart D), and General Stationary Fuel Combustion (Subpart C).

name: ghgrp_oris_power_plant_crosswalk.xlsx
description: Crosswalk between GHGRP Facility IDs and EIA/ORIS IDs -- lets you join GHGRP data to EIA power plant generation data for cross-referencing.

name: l_o_freq_request_data.xlsx
description: Subpart L (Fluorinated Gas Production) and Subpart O (HCFC-22 Production / HFC-23 Destruction), all reporting years.

name: e_s_cems_bb_cc_ll_full_data_set.xlsx
description: Adipic Acid (E), Lime Manufacturing CEMS (S), Silicon Carbide (BB), Soda Ash (CC), Coal-based Liquid Fuel Suppliers (LL) -- all reporting years from 2010.

name: i_freq_request_data.xlsx
description: Subpart I, Electronics Manufacturing, all reporting years from 2011.
